nodes.title: STAGE SWITCHER — work one layer at a time

widgets_values: PER-LAYER SAM3 SCOPE — a depth band alone cuts through objects; each row makes a band layer keep ONLY its segmented content (band ∩ segment). Rows are ALWAYS ACTIVE and SELF-DISARMING (🎯 AtlasScopeMask): an empty prompt (the 🧭 assess node says the layer is absent) or a no-match segment (coverage below min_coverage_pct — e.g. SAM3 scored 0.0% on 'desert floor and boulder', found live) automatically falls back to the plain sky mask = band-only behavior, and the segmenter itself is skipped via lazy evaluation when the prompt is empty. No more bypass dance: prompts arrive wired from the 🧭 staged 5-layer plan; to hand-scope, unlink a prompt and type. GrowMask is now the node's grow_px widget (default 16).
nodes.title: SAM scope doctrine
🔍 MASTER DEBUG — full-stack diagnostic (JSON on disk)

groups.title: 0 · ASSESS + SOLVE (ALWAYS ON) — Q1 runs assess+solve+preview in one go → review 🧭 report + camera, ✅ approve · Q2: full stages
SHARED (ALWAYS ON) — depth, LaMa, SAM3 sky mask rails
1 · SKY  (sky card only — its mask rail lives in SHARED)
STAGE SWITCHER — lists ONLY stages 1–6 (solve/shared are always-on). Bypass stages you have NOT reached; finished stages cache free. To skip solve approval permanently: Ctrl+B the gate node.
SAM SCOPE (optional) — per-layer semantic masks; un-bypass a row's MaskComposite to activate
ASSESS + UPSCALER RAILS (Set/Get — VLM prompts, geometry, upscaler)
